title: FiveHead
description: Allowing you to combine heads to get a bigger head
body:
FiveHead is a mod that allows you to craft together 2 skulls to get a skull back that renders larger when worn. The mod adds a tooltip to a skull that's been enlarged by crafting showing the percentage the skull will render bigger, this tooltip can be disabled through the config.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support me? ##

  -Mrbysco
